key_findings: Based on 3 sub-checks, the site is classified as unknown risk.

findings.observation: All barriers are securely positioned and locked together with no gaps observed.
All workers are wearing high-vis vests and white helmets.

There is no "ROAD WORKS AHEAD" warning sign visible in the video.

recommendations: Ensure the "PEDESTRIANS" sign is correctly positioned at a safe distance from the construction zone.
Install a "ROAD WORKS AHEAD" warning sign to comply with UK Chapter 8 requirements.
